rows.description: Suma totalis omnium Receptorum et Remanentium 5908 07 id in Cista
rows.notes: Visual verification: The description combines elements from both extractors and the image. 'Suma' (not 'Summa') and 'Receptorum' are clear from the image. '5908 07 id' is clearly part of the descriptive text, not a columnar amount, as correctly noted by gemini-flash. 'in Cista' appears on a subsequent line but is included in the full header description. No monetary amounts are recorded in the ledger columns for this header.
